title: illigera trifoliata subsp. trifoliata
intro: Illigera trifoliata subsp. trifoliata is a plant species, also known as Illigera trifoliata, which is native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Illigera trifoliata subsp. trifoliata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and boost the immune system, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. Illigera trifoliata subsp. trifoliata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
